highlights.text: I wrote in yesterdays 4pm newsletter: “The short term bull case is that this current consolidation represents a mature bull flag 5790 to 5740, with 5770-72 key mid-pivot.
This base was largely 5790 to 5740 with a 5770 key mid-pivot, and the pattern was a flag.

post_title: Another Day, Another All Big Time High For SPX. Will This One Stick? Sept 27 Plan
